title: Sphaerostephanos petiolatus
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos petiolatus is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or autumn ferns. This fern is further classified within the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The genus Sphaerostephanos is a part of the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to tropical regions. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants for support. The classification of Sphaerostephanos petiolatus is also sometimes grouped under the subclass Polypodiidae within the division Pteridophyta.
